untranslatable_reason: Signal requires relative strength ranking ('strongest relative strength candidates') and multi-asset comparison logic not available in single-asset indicator set. Pattern trigger type (support/reversal/breakdown) is qualitative and not expressible with allowed operators. Leadership resumption monitoring requires cross-asset correlation analysis.
translation_notes: Approximated using ADX for trend confirmation, pivot levels for pattern triggers, RSI for relative strength deterioration, and support/resistance levels (s1/r1) as proxy for pattern lows. This is a simplified interpretation; true relative strength trading requires comparative analysis across candidate universe.
